---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces if any.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser (if frontend): [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- Node version: [e.g. 18.19.0]
- PHP version (if backend): [e.g. 8.3.1]
- Commit SHA or branch: [e.g. `main@a1b2c3d`]

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing — recent changes, related issues, env vars set, etc.
